name: synthetic-zero-interaction
ground_truth_note: Constructed independence, not curated: five modules from disjoint invented domains (irrigation, chess clock, invoice OCR, morse beacon, aquarium dosing), generated by harness/gen-zero-fixture.mjs which mechanically PROVES pairwise-disjoint code identifiers and zero imports before emitting. Against this fixture the exact-zero assertion is fair — unlike IS-2's real-codebase sets, where four curation rounds each concealed a genuine coupling. Any emitted compound here is pure hallucination.
